title: Youmind 21277 Youmind 21277
prompt: {argument name="style" default="A vibrant, flat illustration of various colorful fish swimming against a light blue background. The fish are depicted in a whimsical, cartoonish style with bold outlines and simple patterns"}. They are arranged in a scattered, playful composition, with some overlapping and others swimming in different directions. The color palette is bright and cheerful, featuring {argument name="colors" default="shades of yellow, pink, orange, blue, green, and gray"}. Each {argument name="subject" default="fish"} has a unique pattern, such as stripes, dots, or wavy lines, adding to the overall playful and energetic feel of the artwork.
originalPrompt: {argument name="style" default="A vibrant, flat illustration of various colorful fish swimming against a light blue background. The fish are depicted in a whimsical, cartoonish style with bold outlines and simple patterns"}. They are arranged in a scattered, playful composition, with some overlapping and others swimming in different directions. The color palette is bright and cheerful, featuring {argument name="colors" default="shades of yellow, pink, orange, blue, green, and gray"}. Each {argument name="subject" default="fish"} has a unique pattern, such as stripes, dots, or wavy lines, adding to the overall playful and energetic feel of the artwork.

promptTranslations.zh: {argument name="style" default="一幅生动平面插画，描绘各种色彩斑斓的鱼类在浅蓝背景中游动。鱼类呈现诙谐卡通风格，线条粗犷，图案简单"}。鱼群以散乱活泼的构图排列，有些重叠，有些朝不同方向游动。色彩明快欢快，包含{argument name="colors" default="shades of yellow, pink, orange, blue, green, and gray"}。每条{argument name="subject" default="fish"}均有独特图案，如条纹、点点或波浪线，增强作品整体的趣味与活力。
promptTranslations.fr: {argument name="style" default="Une illustration vive et plate de différents poissons colorés nageant sur un fond bleu clair. Les poissons sont représentés dans un style fantaisiste et cartoon avec des contours épais et des motifs simples"}. Ils sont disposés dans une composition dispersée et ludique, certains se superposant et d’autres nageant dans différentes directions. La palette de couleurs est vive et joyeuse, avec {argument name="colors" default="des nuances de jaune, rose, orange, bleu, vert et gris"}. Chaque {argument name="subject" default="poisson"} possède un motif unique, tel que des rayures, des points ou des ondulations, ajoutant à l’ambiance générale ludique et dynamique de l’œuvre.
promptTranslations.ru: {argument name="style" default="Яркая плоская иллюстрация различных красочных рыб, плавающих на светло-голубом фоне. Рыбы изображены в причудливом мультяшном стиле с четкими контурами и простыми узорами"}. Они расположены в разбросанной, игривой композиции, некоторые перекрываются, другие плывут в разных направлениях. Цветовая палитра яркая и жизнерадостная, включает {argument name="colors" default="оттенки желтого, розового, оранжевого, синего, зеленого и серого"}. Каждая {argument name="subject" default="рыба"} имеет уникальный узор, например, полосы, точки или волнистые линии, что добавляет общей игривости и энергии произведению.
promptTranslations.pt: {argument name="style" default="Uma ilustração vibrante e plana de vários peixes coloridos nadando contra um fundo azul claro. Os peixes são representados em um estilo lúdico e cartunesco com contornos fortes e padrões simples"}. Eles estão dispostos em uma composição espalhada e divertida, com alguns se sobrepondo e outros nadando em direções diferentes. A paleta de cores é brilhante e alegre, apresentando {argument name="colors" default="tons de amarelo, rosa, laranja, azul, verde e cinza"}. Cada {argument name="subject" default="peixe"} tem um padrão único, como listras, pontos ou linhas onduladas, acrescentando à sensação geral divertida e energética da obra.
promptTranslations.ja: {argument name="style" default="ライトブルーの背景を泳ぐ多彩なカラフルな魚たちの活気あふれるフラットイラスト。魚は遊び心のあるカートゥーン風スタイルで、大胆な輪郭とシンプルなパターンで描かれています"}。魚たちは散らばった遊び心ある配置で、一部は重なり合い、他は異なる方向に泳いでいます。カラーパレットは明るく陽気で、{argument name="colors" default="黄色、ピンク、オレンジ、青、緑、グレーの色合い"}が特徴です。各{argument name="subject" default="魚"}は独特な模様（縞模様、水玉模様、波線など）を持ち、作品全体の遊び心とエネルギッシュな雰囲気を高めています。
promptTranslations.ko: {argument name="style" default="A vibrant, flat illustration of various colorful fish swimming against a light blue background. The fish are depicted in a whimsical, cartoonish style with bold outlines and simple patterns"}. 장난스럽고 흩어진 구성으로 몇몇은 겹치고 일부는 다른 방향으로 헤엄치듯 배치되어 있습니다. 컬러 팔레트는 밝고 쾌활하며 {argument name="colors" default="shades of yellow, pink, orange, blue, green, and gray"}를 특징으로 합니다. 각각의 {argument name="subject" default="fish"}는 줄무늬, 점, 또는 물결 무늬와 같은 독특한 패턴을 가지고 있어 전체 작품에 장난스럽고 활기찬 느낌을 더합니다.
